TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Arisan_go, title = Arisan_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arisan_go} }

S.FORM: Arisan go mki sku Kagi Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 468.34 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 389.79 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 83.84 km²), 4,081 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,373 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,459 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 85%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Cou ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Arisan go ays psgayun 12 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Niae' ucna , Tapangʉ , Tfuya , Lalauya , Pnguu , Saviki , Sinvi , Cayamavana . tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.

Arisan go mki sku Kagi Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 468.34 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 389.79 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 83.84 km²), 4,081 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,373 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 3,459 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 85%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Cou ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Arisan go ays psgayun 12 ru 8 alang. 8 alang hani ga, Niae' ucna , Tapangʉ , Tfuya , Lalauya , Pnguu , Saviki , Sinvi , Cayamavana . tuqi 'san ungat kisya' nya'. "Taywan hawsing" qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'.
S.PHON: aris~ɕan ɣo mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na ʦ~ʨou ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu aris~ɕan ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, niaeʔ uʦ~ʨna , tapaŋ* , t*uja , lalauja , pŋuu , s~ɕa*iki , s~ɕin*i , ʦ~ʨajama*ana . tuqi ʔs~ɕan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. "tajwan ħaws~ɕiŋ" qu s~ɕpzjaŋ ɣlɣaŋ nħa qalaŋ mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ.
